normalization.notes: Store Coptic text in NFC and preserve dialectal spelling, combining marks, and source punctuation. Do not strip supralinear strokes or normalize Coptic letters to Greek lookalikes.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Coptic letters, Greek-derived letters, Demotic-derived letters, supralinear marks, common articles, and selected high-frequency word chunks
segmentation.notes: Printed Coptic is left-to-right and usually whitespace-delimited in normalized editions. Manuscripts and liturgical editions may need punctuation and supralinear mark review before runtime display.
